textByHash.8db1607a40518b1621ecd82980e38a99d37205d2: Hello, do you need any help?
textByHash.254e299e15f4c2dc8dbddeabbded03ddcb8e5650: A shield? Sounds like my area. What do you need?
textByHash.db8808cf30f736a97c047e9b023a41ce797a12c9: Oh, I see. What do you need me to do?
textByHash.f4cbb7a95d69b4850ca297a0793b0b9fda317400: The Shield of Arrav? Sounds a bit unlikely to me, but I'll give it a go.
textByHash.3c45b252f762c806b7aaa5e248ac57110fa04e4b: It doesn't seem to be doing anything exciting.
textByHash.00ddfc4aeb6d77e237a2741acecbd236fab5c8df: Well good luck finding them. Last thing we need is those zombies moving on the rest of the city.
textByHash.2249410b51a6a9e845017e5e5df39ebbd9a57524: It doesn't seem to be doing anything exciting. Why do you think I was descended from an original elder of Avarrocka, anyway?
textByHash.c6bc09831e2bb0d032e08c2dcc1066e9319ea4c3: Ah... I'm not actually a blood descendant of the Ravitzes. My great-grandfather was adopted into the family.
textByHash.616caa9083b48e80fbde6704646dc3bdae907b9c: I'm the only one I know of with the Ravitz surname. The last descendant of the Ravitz line was a lady named Shauna Ravitz. She married into the Fitzharmon family.
textByHash.28853edfe82b6a52595ed33acc70f68cc421f5dd: Hmm, Seth eh! He's a good friend, but he still owes me three steel bars for a plough I fixed. I'm sorry but I need to have that paid off first before I can do any more work for him.
textByHash.bf6690e5b713774ef2b94dc68b02c4cf53260a15: I'm sorry to be so harsh, but I have to ensure the debt is paid before I do any more work for Seth.
textByHash.fb538c50b3b5b04682b8756f04f671ac9f4347df: Ok then! Great...tell me a little more about these chicken cages... Cough Cough Cough!
textByHash.9ecd02d943daf8379fb18740fb92feead35fc98a: No, I'm not actually, I'm quite ill!
textByHash.b6078982b0f6f1c8a0ace5412c6cbfc6296386b6: I'm sorry, but the most I can manage today is simple trading...however, if I was to get some medicine say, I could be persuaded to do you a small favour!
textByHash.1ba14cc7de919d7709b29a162de35983185d7093: Well, just one small favour...and then I'll do you a small favour.
textByHash.7e069a98dbd33f0647842b19b75c1ac0412d93b9: Well, I'm sorry about that...but I just can't work when I'm feeling so ill.
textByHash.6fdb390c9a87dc7d73559bc57f926c5b39f17947: Well that's jolly decent of you my friend. I need some medicine, could you get me some herbal tincture and breathing salts, that should solve my ailments!
textByHash.b69eab528a938d5e5fdff18fcc03abeb1e18d63b: That's great! However, I must warn you, it'll be a lot easier for me to simply adjust some existing pigeon cages. If you could get me five or so of those, that would help a lot.
textByHash.7ff6f54e02689ae56052f761b6ced54d503c2816: But first things first, bring me the medicine!
textByHash.36546d9c1480c42c2fee918f1a595d9e6bc63cfe: Please can you get me some medicine? I need herbal tincture and a pot of breathing salts. Also, get me five or so of those pigeon cages that they have over in Ardougne so that I can convert them into chicken
textByHash.e360ed519b33686a538310100249d9b8e5b7da4a: Well that's no good, I need the breathing salts as well!
textByHash.cb373120ff643d71ae05ee5677b02ce78a1e22f5: Well that's no good, I need the tincture as well!
textByHash.7be4478454249a90219ac38d0cffdbcdd3e708a1: Great! Let's have a look at them then!
textByHash.d90eb3bac7c89de39017744de8fc57bacc59b0cd: Wonderful! That's just great! I just need the pigeon cages now.
textByHash.da857a2d34e0e16ae6e822a6b0c0a98f1e445246: I need you to get me five pigeon cages, apparently you can get them from Ardougne. When I have them, I can convert them into chicken cages for you.
textByHash.f6e46d6459267d6f17b7202869d879b26a904a81: Great stuff...let's have them here then! Ah, I can turn my hand to a bit of woodworking on these, great, I do it as a hobby.
textByHash.717bef5ff6f992aa5b15b9c9fcd2ca4baf04c010: There you go then! There's your chicken cages!
textByHash.8a0b17df5778d9eb3a6f6204a9050c502244fe7e: Well, Ok, I'm going to need a pigeon cage to convert it, plus some money for my time, say a 100 gold?
textByHash.bb680a2ab4fae64d0cf617d11f148b8097e7b12b: Sorry, but you'll have to get one so that I can convert it.
textByHash.7017d32877e69a8e412719f89730c65dd87dde46: Sorry, but I have to charge for my time!
textByHash.1aa1510015f99928fbe087c88950aff461680202: Well, come and see me if you're ever in need of armour!
textByHash.417c505069e6952cba0367b8948a13b015c38f6a: I've always wondered what would happen if I crushed an air rune. Have this on me.
